Name: CartridgeBehaviorParam
Description: Determines the ejection behavior of ejected bullet cartridges.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: Initial velocity of the cartridge. In metres.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity: Random Range
Fields.Description: Random velocity range of the cartridge. In metres.

Fields.Name: Speed Inheritance: Character - Random Range
Fields.Description: Character speed transfer rate. Random range of the inherited speed.

Fields.Name: Ejection Angle
Fields.Description: Angle from the horizontal angle reference of the dummy polygon (+: ↑ direction, -: ↓ direction). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Ejection Angle: Random Range
Fields.Description: The random range of degrees for the ejection angle.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Acceleration
Fields.Description: Acceleration for the cartridge gravity. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Acceleration - Random Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration for the cartridge gravity. Random range of the acceleration. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the X-axis. In degrees per second

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (X-Axis) - Random Range
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the X-axis. Random range of the rotational velocity. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the Y-axis. In degrees per second

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (Y-Axis) - Random Range
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the Y-axis. Random range of the rotational velocity. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the Z-axis. In degrees per second

Fields.Name: Rotational Velocity (Z-Axis) - Random Range
Fields.Description: Rotational velocity on the Z-axis. Random range of the rotational velocity. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Yaw Angle
Fields.Description: Angle from the horizontal angle reference of the dummy poly (+: right direction of the dummy poly, -: left direction of the dummy poly).

Fields.Name: Yaw Angle - Random Range
Fields.Description: Angle from the horizontal angle reference of the dummy poly (+: right direction of the dummy poly, -: left direction of the dummy poly).
